verification.rule: Subprocess smoke tests cover malformed JSON for every registered hook and the selected uninspectable/block behavior returns non-zero.
verification.evidence: Shared destructive-bash policy blocks invalid JSON/non-object payloads; Claude and Codex hook tests pass in just check.

verification.rule: A gate defines and enforces one installability rule: no unintended draft skill appears in install discovery, or the repo explicitly documents lane-driven installability and checks that status semantics match it.
verification.evidence: Release contract enforces published status for installable public skills and an empty skills/.experimental lane; install discovery finds 7 skills.

verification.rule: Curator shape docs and any curator static checks require evals/run-static-checks.sh, evals/trigger-evals.json, and evals/activation-cases.md for every generated public skill.
verification.evidence: skill-curator guidance now targets published public skills with required eval artifacts; skill-curator static eval passes.

verification.rule: Shared-content check traverses skills/_shared/** and validates every consumer symlink in references/ and templates/ for relative target, resolution, and matching basename.
verification.evidence: scripts/check-shared-content.sh verifies references and templates resolving into skills/_shared/**; just check verified 31 symlinks.

verification.rule: One shared command-policy module or generated artifact feeds thin Claude/Codex adapters, and parity tests run every registered hook path.
verification.evidence: Claude/Codex hook adapters import scripts/hooks/destructive_bash_policy.py; Just and CI run both hook test suites.

verification.rule: A lane-contract check enumerates .agents/skills/* and either requires a static check for each repo-local skill or documents and enforces the narrower exception.
verification.evidence: scripts/check-release-contract.py requires repo-local SKILL.md plus eval static checks and activation cases; skill-curator now provides them.

verification.rule: A repo-owned validation runner/port handles schema paths and repo root discovery; per-skill scripts call the port or declare only skill-specific assertions.
verification.evidence: scripts/static-check-lib.sh owns repo-root discovery and canonical schema/name checks; public skill scripts call it.

verification.rule: Schema and fixtures enforce the chosen category requirement and route/activation consistency, including invalid cases for missing category and bad route shape.
verification.evidence: schemas/trigger-evals.schema.json requires category/expected_route, constrains route ids, and rejects expected_route on non-activating cases; release contract rechecks these invariants.

verification.rule: One repo-owned install-discovery wrapper is called from both Just and CI with the same skills version, cache policy, telemetry setting, and failure vocabulary.
verification.evidence: scripts/list-installable-skills.sh centralizes skills CLI version, npm cache, telemetry, and update-notifier policy; Just and CI call it.

verification.rule: Shared runner covers common schema/name/registry/source-safety/result-format mechanics while per-skill scripts keep only genuinely skill-specific assertions.
verification.evidence: scripts/static-check-lib.sh covers common JSON contract mechanics; per-skill scripts retain content-specific checks.

decisions.decision: Roadmap and external issues were not created; those require explicit user request.
No installable skills should remain in draft or experimental lanes; repository prerelease maturity is communicated by the 0.0.1-alpha tag.

next_action: Open one PR for the audit fixes; cut the 0.0.1-alpha release tag from the merge commit after it lands.

handoff.reason: Several findings are gate-hardening and agent-surface boundary work.
